So to create a custom conversion what you're going to do is come up here after you're in your ads manager You're gonna come up here through these three little lines. Click on custom conversions Then you're going to create custom conversion My pixel is inactive because I don't have Facebook ads going out, but your pixel should be Your URL here you're gonna put the thank you URL from the click for so you come to your click photos click on your thank you page and Your thank you URL is going to be this Whatever you have right here. You'll copy that Paste it over here Name your conversion Category is always going to be lead and And then you'll hit create now once you hit create You'll see your custom conversion here, and then you'll just go to another When or another tab and in your address bar you'll paste the Thank you URL here and Then refresh it Five or six times Just to get some activity on your custom conversion once you've refreshed it five or six times go back to your Custom conversion page and Facebook Refresh that and you should see the dot turn from gray to green
